text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru makes it through<n>the Mainichi
Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Once again, our next goal race is left<n>to fate! And
the gods decree that our<n>next race is... the
formidable<n>Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Although she has some gripes with<n>the outcome,
Matikanefukukitaru<n>accepts her destiny. In order
to claim<n>victory in the Japanese Derby, she...<n>runs
off to improve her luck at a<n>shrine.
